nasb.text: They turned aside there in order to enter and lodge in Gibeah. When they entered, they sat down in the open square of the city, for no one took them into his house to spend the night.

esv.text: and they turned aside there, to go in and spend the night at Gibeah. And he went in and sat down in the open square of the city, for no one took them into his house to spend the night.

cnv.text: 他們從那裡轉身，要進基比亞去住宿；他們進去，坐在城裡的廣場上，因為沒有人接待他們到家裡去住宿。

ccb.text: 他们决定在那里过夜。因为没有人接待他们，他们只好在城中的广场露宿。
